name: clawsembly
description: Verified, capability-safe browser embedding infrastructure for upstream OpenClaw.

scripts.typecheck:api: tsc --noEmit --strict --skipLibCheck false --target ES2023 --module Node16 --moduleResolution Node16 --lib ES2023,DOM packages/browser-runtime/browser-runtime.d.mts packages/browser-runtime/browserpod-runtime.d.mts packages/browser-runtime/browserpod-preflight.d.mts packages/browser-runtime/cooperative-process.d.mts packages/browser-runtime/browserpod-openclaw-probe.d.mts packages/capability-broker/capability-broker.d.mts packages/capability-broker/mailbox-protocol.d.mts packages/capability-broker/filesystem-mailbox-host.d.mts packages/capability-broker/guest-mailbox-client.d.mts packages/embed-sdk/embed-manifest.d.mts packages/embed-sdk/boot.d.mts
scripts.test: node --test packages/browser-runtime/*.test.mjs packages/capability-broker/*.test.mjs packages/compatibility/src/*.test.mjs packages/embed-sdk/*.test.mjs packages/webcontainer-adapter/*.test.mjs
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run compat:validate && npm run workflows:validate && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.release:check: npm run social:render && npm run check && npm run test:security && npm run test:page && npm run build:pages && node packages/compatibility/src/release-readiness.mjs
